ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Trustee.

Mr. Siracusa stated that the issue of the social security payments is handled in the conservatorship matter, that accountings are waived in the conservatorship, that they met the threshold for waiver of accountings in the conservatorship and that the funds were used for the Conservatee's care. The Court expressed concern about how the estate is being depleted because of heavy expenses and suggested that Counsel have a discussion with Ms. Price reviewing the expenses for the future and whether there will be resources to provide for the Conservatee's care. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (20 Blair Place, Piedmont, Ca 94611)
Off Calendar Jul-19-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Mary Price.

The sale was confirmed at $1,020,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $1,081,000.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
